bio: Business Analyst @ MetLife | Ex-Data Scientist | Building AI research tools, NLP systems, and data-driven products.
about: I'm a data-driven problem solver who builds practical AI and analytics solutions. With a background in Applied Statistics and Energy Science, I bridge the gap between complex data and real-world impact. I specialize in NLP systems, LLM-powered tools, and end-to-end data pipelines — from research prototypes to production-ready applications.

featured.name: Newspaper Sub Assistant Agent
featured.summary: AI platform for translating and transforming news content with hard/soft news formatting optimized for Bangladeshi Bengali audiences.

featured.name: Multi-Tool Research Bot
featured.summary: AI-powered research assistant integrating ArXiv papers, Wikipedia, web search, code analysis, and automatic file generation for comprehensive research workflows.

featured.name: AR License Plate Detection
featured.summary: Computer vision system for real-time license plate detection and recognition. Delivered as a client project with NDA restrictions.

projects.name: LLM Benchmarking Research
projects.summary: Thesis project benchmarking local LLM agents (DeepSeek, Mistral, LLaMA3) for academic research tasks with FAISS vector storage and Ollama integration.

projects.name: PDF Chatbot (DeepSeek)
projects.summary: Interactive PDF analysis tool with AI chatbot capabilities, featuring table/image extraction and citation tracking.

projects.name: Agentic AI Chatbot - Basic
projects.summary: Multi-tool chatbot combining ArXiv research papers, Wikipedia articles, and Tavily web search into a unified conversational interface.

projects.name: Agentic AI Chatbot - Advanced
projects.summary: Enhanced conversational AI with advanced dialogue management, context retention, and multi-turn reasoning capabilities.

projects.name: YouTube Bot
projects.summary: Extract and analyze transcripts from YouTube videos for content summarization and information retrieval.

summary: Gather and analyze requirements for data/AI initiatives
QA Lead for ETL, report delivery, and data migration
Assist Data & AI teams via Agile methodology
Lead AI automation projects including real-time license detection
Automated newspaper sub-editing (Agent Swiftor) and script/ad generation (Pixiva)
Oversee dashboards and data science projects

experience.company: Radiant Data System / Envision Healthcare System, USA
summary: Developed Tableau dashboards for healthcare KPIs
Wrote optimized SQL queries for data extraction and ad-hoc reporting
Built ML models for recommendations, custom chatbots and QA systems
Designed analytics pipelines with GTM, Firebase, GA
Led renewable energy projects from requirements gathering through implementation

research.title: LLM Benchmarking for Academic Research Tasks
research.description: Master's thesis benchmarking local LLM agents (DeepSeek, Mistral, LLaMA3) on academic research tasks including literature review, summarization, and question answering — using FAISS vector storage and Ollama for local inference.
